headline: CME Group (CME) To Launch Sorghum Basis Futures In August 2026
summary: CME Group (NasdaqGS:CME) plans to launch Sorghum basis futures in August 2026. The new contract focuses on the price relationship between sorghum and corn. The product uses existing grain infrastructure in Kansas to support trading and delivery. The futures aim to provide additional risk management tools for agricultural producers and traders. CME Group, a major futures and options marketplace, is expanding its agricultural derivatives lineup with Sorghum basis futures, set to launch in...

headline: CME Group’s (NASDAQ:CME) Q2 CY2026 Sales Top Estimates
summary: Financial derivatives exchange CME Group (NASDAQ:CME) reported Q2 CY2026 results topping the market’s revenue expectations, but sales were flat year on year at $1.71 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.99 per share was 2.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
